final_answer: COVID-19 symptoms are diverse and can include respiratory, musculoskeletal, and digestive symptoms. Common symptoms include fever, cough, and loss of taste or smell. Other symptoms may involve congestion, runny nose, sore throat, shortness of breath, fatigue, headaches, body or muscle aches, and digestive issues such as diarrhea. Symptoms typically appear 2 to 14 days after exposure to the virus. In severe cases, symptoms like difficulty breathing, chest pain, and confusion may require urgent medical attention [doc2_covid19:0:ebebb3ea; doc2_covid19:1:353c1cc7; doc2_covid19:2:b62cb9bc; doc2_covid19:3:49dc5868; doc2_covid19:4:6e73a8ac; doc1_covid19:0:c10f2c08; doc3_covid19:0:ca62de7d; doc1_covid19:1:dac16583; doc3_covid19:1:dd82d7a1; doc3_covid19:4:6ec39909].
